description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image with a global before_script that runs `python -V` and `locale`. Define stages test and deploy and set variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to normal. In the test stage add a unittesting job that runs `pip install -r requirements.txt`, `git submodule update --remote`, `pip install coverage`, `python update.py`, `coverage run setup.py test`, `coverage html`, and `coverage report`; it always stores all untracked files as artifacts for 1 day and runs except on scheduled pipelines. In the deploy stage add a pages job that creates a public directory, moves the generated coverage_html_report into public/coverage, installs pycco with `pip install pycco`, runs `pycco pays/*.py -d public -i`, and publishes the public/ folder as a pages artifact for 1 day, but does not run on schedules. Also in deploy add a pypi job that runs only on tags, executes `python -V`, installs pandoc via `apt update && apt -y install pandoc`, installs `pypandoc` and `pandoc` with `pip install pypandoc pandoc`, writes a temporary ~/.pypirc using the PYPI_USER and PYPI_PASSWORD variables, uploads the source distribution with `python setup.py check sdist upload -r pypi`, and then removes the .pypirc file.
